tagline: Offline utilities for developers and QA engineers

welcome.title: Welcome to QAKit Toolbox
welcome.body: 13 offline utilities for developers and QA — JSON, YAML, JWT, hashes, regex, passwords, color picker, screenshots and more. All in the side panel, one click away.

tools.title: Pick a tool, get to work
tools.body: Tools are grouped by category and searchable. Switch between encoders, generators, testers, QA tools and design helpers from the home screen.

privacy.title: Your data stays on your device
privacy.body: QAKit Toolbox is fully offline. No telemetry, no uploads. Everything is processed locally and stored only in your browser.

ready.title: You're all set
ready.body: Tweak theme and language anytime in Settings. Have fun, and happy debugging.

ratingPrompt.title: Enjoying QAKit Toolbox?
ratingPrompt.body: If it saves you tab-switches every day, a quick rating helps other QA engineers and developers find it.
